message:
fix(core): use background-status op context and conditional memdb reload for INSERT preparation

The INSERT fast-path preparation now obtains its operation context via
op_cx_after_background_status() instead of op_cx(), and uses a two-
phase memdb refresh: if rows have never been loaded, reload from the
pager; otherwise, refresh from the cached write-txn if stale. This
prevents unnecessary full pager reads when the memdb already has valid
rows from a prior write transaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
